calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-28-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Devendra Patel present with counsel, Bruce Burge.
Defendant, Larry Kenneth present in pro per.
Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendant, Larry Kenneth, residing at 1485 Pine Street, #418, San Francisco, CA.
owes $2,513.15 in back rent and damages through today, and the daily damages thereafter at $15.02 per day.
If the Defendant vacates the premises on or before July 9, 2003 at 3:00 PM. Plaintiff will waive any and all back rent and damages owing and to dismissed with prejudice.
If Defendant fails to vacate as agreed, Plaintiff is entitled to entry of Judgment against Defendant upon ex-parte application and declaration with 24 hours notice to the Defendant. Judgment for restitution and possession of the property.
Judgment for all back rent and damages owing.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Each party waives claim against the other.
Each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees.
Any items left in the premises will be disposed of.
Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
